meta.title: HK EDB Junior Secondary Mathematics — S1-S2 Learning Objectives

objectives.description_en: Understand integers, their ordering on the number line, and perform addition, subtraction, multiplication and division of integers including negative numbers.
objectives.description_zh: 理解整數及其在數線上的排列，能對整數（包括負數）進行加、減、乘、除運算。

objectives.description_en: Understand proper/improper fractions and mixed numbers. Simplify fractions and find equivalent fractions.
objectives.description_zh: 理解真分數、假分數及帶分數的概念，能化簡分數及求等值分數。

objectives.description_en: Add and subtract fractions and mixed numbers with unlike denominators using LCM.
objectives.description_zh: 能利用最小公倍數對不同分母的分數及帶分數進行加減運算。

objectives.description_en: Multiply and divide fractions and mixed numbers; understand the reciprocal concept.
objectives.description_zh: 能對分數及帶分數進行乘除運算，理解倒數概念。

objectives.description_en: Perform addition, subtraction, multiplication and division of decimals; convert between fractions and decimals.
objectives.description_zh: 能對小數進行加減乘除運算，並能在分數與小數之間互相換算。

objectives.description_en: Convert between percentages, fractions, and decimals. Solve problems involving percentage change, profit, loss, and discount.
objectives.description_zh: 能在百分數、分數及小數之間互換。解決涉及百分比變化、利潤、虧損及折扣的問題。

objectives.description_en: Understand ratio and rate. Simplify ratios, divide quantities in a given ratio, and solve speed/distance/time problems.
objectives.description_zh: 理解比率與速率的概念，能化簡比率、按比例分配數量，並解決速度/距離/時間問題。

objectives.description_en: Use letters to represent unknowns. Write, read, and simplify algebraic expressions. Evaluate expressions by substitution.
objectives.description_zh: 能以字母代表未知數，撰寫、閱讀及化簡代數式，並以代入法求代數式的值。

objectives.description_en: Solve linear equations in one unknown using inverse operations. Formulate and solve equations from word problems.
objectives.description_zh: 能用逆運算解一元一次方程，並能從文字題中建立及求解方程。

objectives.name_zh: 多項式的展開與因式分解
objectives.description_en: Expand products of polynomials, factorise using common factors and identities (difference of squares, perfect squares).
objectives.description_zh: 能展開多項式的乘積，以公因式及恆等式（平方差、完全平方式）進行因式分解。

objectives.description_en: Solve simultaneous linear equations in two unknowns by substitution and elimination. Apply to real-world problems.
objectives.description_zh: 能以代入法及消元法解二元一次聯立方程，並應用於實際問題。

objectives.description_en: Understand inequality symbols. Solve linear inequalities in one unknown and represent solutions on a number line.
objectives.description_zh: 理解不等號，解一元一次不等式，並在數線上表示解集。

objectives.name_en: Perimeter and Area of Plane Figures
objectives.name_zh: 平面圖形的周界與面積
objectives.description_en: Find perimeter and area of triangles, quadrilaterals, and composite figures. Use appropriate units.
objectives.description_zh: 能求三角形、四邊形及複合圖形的周界與面積，並使用適當的單位。

objectives.name_en: Circumference and Area of a Circle
objectives.description_en: Understand pi. Calculate circumference and area of circles and sectors. Solve problems involving circular shapes.
objectives.description_zh: 理解圓周率π，計算圓和扇形的周長與面積，解決涉及圓形的問題。

objectives.description_en: Identify types of angles. Understand properties of parallel lines: corresponding, alternate, and co-interior angles.
objectives.description_zh: 識別各種角的類型，理解平行線的性質：同位角、交錯角及同旁內角。

objectives.description_en: Identify types of triangles. Apply angle sum and exterior angle theorem. Understand congruence and similarity criteria.
objectives.description_zh: 識別各類三角形，應用角和定理及外角定理，理解全等與相似的判別條件。

objectives.description_en: Identify and apply properties of parallelograms, rectangles, rhombuses, squares, and trapezoids.
objectives.description_zh: 識別並應用平行四邊形、長方形、菱形、正方形及梯形的性質。

objectives.name_en: Volume and Surface Area of 3D Figures
objectives.name_zh: 立體圖形的體積與表面積
objectives.description_en: Calculate volume and surface area of prisms, cylinders, pyramids, cones, and spheres.
objectives.description_zh: 計算棱柱、圓柱、棱錐、圓錐及球的體積與表面積。

objectives.description_en: Plot points in the Cartesian plane. Find distance and midpoint between two points. Understand slope of a line.
objectives.description_zh: 在笛卡兒坐標平面上描點，求兩點間的距離與中點，理解直線的斜率。

objectives.description_en: Construct and interpret bar charts, pie charts, broken-line graphs, and frequency tables.
objectives.description_zh: 能繪製及詮釋棒形圖、餅圖、折線圖及頻數分佈表。

objectives.description_en: Calculate and interpret mean, median, and mode. Understand when each measure is appropriate.
objectives.description_zh: 計算及詮釋平均數、中位數和眾數，並理解各量度的適用情況。

objectives.description_en: Understand probability as a measure of likelihood (0 to 1). List sample spaces, calculate simple and complementary probabilities.
objectives.description_zh: 理解概率作為可能性的量度（0至1），列出樣本空間，計算簡單及互補概率。

demo_questions.stem_en: The radius of a circle is 5 cm. Find its area. (Take π = 3.14)
demo_questions.stem_zh: 一個圓的半徑為5厘米。求其面積。（取π = 3.14）
